Fields.Name: Never Forget Distance when on Ladder (TARGET_ENE_0)
Fields.Description: When TARGET_ENE_0 is on a ladder, if the height difference with the enemy itself is within this value, the target will not be forgotten.

Fields.Name: Distance from Player that allows Ceiling Height Determination
Fields.Description: Only when the distance from the local player is less than this distance, the lifting height of the floor integral will be determined by considering the ceiling height.

Fields.Name: Wall Collision Interrupt Flag: Judgement Angle
Fields.Description: Threshold value of the angle between the wall normal and the movement direction (opposite direction). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Wall Collision Interrupt Flag: Judgment Duration
Fields.Description: Threshold for the time that wall collision lasts (If it gets too large, flag issuance will be delayed; if it gets too small, it will be easier to accidentally detonate). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Wall Collision Interrupt Flag: Allowable Interruption Time
Fields.Description: Maximum allowable interruption time, as wall collisions can be choppy due to system and terrain considerations.

Fields.Name: Judgement Duration for Forced Lift when Stuck on Slope
Fields.Description: If you continue to get stuck on the slope for more than this time, forced lift update will be performed depending on the NPC parameter settings. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Phantom ID: Time-based Activation
Fields.Description: Fade the phantom shader with appearance/disappearance effects.

Fields.Name: Awareness Decay Start Time to Upper Limit
Fields.Description: Enemy search level Decay start time to upper limit. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Awareness: Change to Discovery State Trigger
Fields.Description: Enemy search level that shifts to complete discovery state.

Fields.Name: Awareness: Change to Normal State Trigger
Fields.Description: Enemy search level that shifts to complete normal state.

Fields.Name: Awareness Decrease: Grace Duration (Normal)
Fields.Description: Grace time until enemy search level decreases - Normal (in seconds).

Fields.Name: Awareness Decrease: Grace Duration (Damage)
Fields.Description: Grace time until enemy search level decreases - During Damage (in seconds).

Fields.Name: Max Awareness
Fields.Description: Maximum enemy search level.

Fields.Name: Engagement: Grace Duration
Fields.Description: Grace time until engagement level decreases (for perception in new specifications). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Engagement: Decrease per Second
Fields.Description: The amount of engagement level that decreases every second.

Fields.Name: Target Sharing: Grace Duration
Fields.Description: Grace time before sharing target. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Sense: Engagement Decrease per Second
Fields.Description: Amount of reduction in engagement level accumulated due to audiovisual/hitting. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Scan: Engagement Decrease per Second
Fields.Description: Engagement reduction amount accumulated by radar. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Scan: Engagement Decrease Grace Duration
Fields.Description: Grace time until engagement level decreases (radar). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Awareness Reduction per Second
Fields.Description: Decreased amount of enemy search level per second.

Fields.Name: Core: Body Guage
Fields.Description: Body trunk gauge (point)

Fields.Name: Core: Action Guage
Fields.Description: Body trunk gauge (point)

Fields.Name: Core Recovery: Wait Time
Fields.Description: Time to wait for core recovery. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Core Recovery: HP per Second
Fields.Description: Points per second to restore core recovery.

Fields.Name: Platoon Follower: Role Evaluation Interval
Fields.Description: Time interval for evaluating platoon follower roles. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Attacker Battle Limit Distance
Fields.Description: Within the set distance, the attacker will be given priority to the locked-on character. In metres.

Fields.Name: Platoon Patrol: Route Correction Upper Limit Radius
Fields.Description: Radius value for correction of tour route smoothing process.

Fields.Name: Shared Target Recognition Delay Error
Fields.Description: Delay time = shared target recognition delay + random( 0, shared target recognition delay error). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Impact Invicibility Time
Fields.Description: Impact value invalidation time when exiting the state of 'impact invincibility activated when exiting the state'. In seconds.
